Usage:  circleci project settings <command>

Available commands:
  ai-error-summarization
  auto-cancel-builds
  build-forked-pull-requests
  build-prs-only
  disable-running
  disable-ssh
  dynamic-config
  forks-receive-secret-env-vars
  list
  oss
  set-github-status
  unversioned-config
  write-settings-requires-admin
